overrides.comment: Build-only transitive advisory pins, not in shipped output. esbuild: GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr / GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr (via Astro→Vite); mirrors the main repo's SHA-158 fix. path-to-regexp: GHSA-9wv6-86v2-598j ReDoS (via @astrojs/vercel→@vercel/routing-utils, which already aliases the patched 6.3.0 internally); avoids the audit-fix downgrade to the Astro-5 adapter.
